atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: Register custom theme tokens (colors, spacing, fonts, etc.) that generate utility classes.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: Define a custom utility class that participates in Tailwind's variant system.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: Define a custom variant for use with utility classes.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: Add additional source paths for Tailwind to scan for class usage.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: Load a Tailwind CSS plugin.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: Reference a legacy JavaScript config file.
